Freya G-Link FlexV
Core Products · 01 / Freya

High-Performance
Programmable
RF Transceiver.

A single chip architecture engineered to span sub-1 GHz to Wi-Fi 7 — software-defined, defense-grade, and ready for seven domains of deployment.

RF Transceiver Market · 2025 → 2033

A trillion signals, one programmable platform.

$35.7B
2025 Market Size
$80.8B
2033 Projected
9.5%
CAGR
VII
Application Domains
National Digital Sovereignty

The chip is the perimeter.

When connectivity is owned by foreign vendors, every device becomes a sovereignty risk. Freya is designed from first principles for verifiable, on-shore production — and reprogrammable in the field as standards and threats evolve.

  • NDAA-compliant.Sourcing, fab partners, and BoM verified end-to-end.
  • Software-defined.One silicon, infinite waveforms — patch in firmware, not new hardware.
  • Spectrum agility.Sub-1 GHz through 6 GHz, jam-resilient by design.
The Freya Architecture

One silicon, every domain.

Freya unifies what used to require a portfolio of single-purpose radios. Wi-Fi 7 access points, smart-meter HaLow nodes, V2X RSUs, tactical SDRs — the same programmable core, retuned in firmware.

From living rooms to the battlefield.
Application Scenarios

Seven domains. One programmable core.

I

Consumer & Family

Routers · Mesh · Smart Home · AR/VR
04 Apps
01

Wi-Fi Router

Wi-Fi 5/6/6E/7 high-speed home connectivity for any density.

02

Mesh Network

Whole-home seamless coverage — roaming without re-auth.

03

Smart Home

Locks, sensors, cameras — one unified wireless fabric.

04

AR / VR

Sub-millisecond wireless for immersive head-worn computing.

II

Internet of Things

HaLow · Smart City · Meters · Agriculture
04 Apps
01

Wi-Fi HaLow

Long-range, low-power IoT — kilometres on a coin cell.

02

Smart City

Urban sensor networks for traffic, lighting, and air.

03

Smart Meters

Grid-scale metering with 10-year battery life.

04

Agriculture

Soil, weather, and livestock telemetry across hectares.

III

Industrial Automation

Factory · AGV · Vision · Private Networks
04 Apps
01

Automation

Deterministic wireless control for factory floors.

02

AGV / AMR

Mobile-robot fleets with sub-10ms control latency.

03

Machine Vision

High-bandwidth wireless camera feeds in motion.

04

Private Network

Site-licensed industrial-grade wireless infrastructure.

IV

Communications & Infrastructure

5G · CPE · Satellite · Backhaul
04 Apps
01

5G Small Cell

Dense urban deployment with multi-band agility.

02

CPE

Customer premises equipment for fixed wireless access.

03

SATCOM

LEO/GEO ground terminals with steerable beams.

04

Backhaul

Microwave + mmWave links for carrier infrastructure.

V

Automotive

V2X · RSU · Autonomy · In-Cabin
04 Apps
01

V2X

Vehicle-to-everything: cars, lights, peers, the cloud.

02

RSU

Roadside units broadcasting traffic state and warnings.

03

Autonomy

Self-driving radio stack — high-availability, redundant.

04

In-Car Wi-Fi

In-vehicle wireless for passengers and infotainment.

VI

Defense

Encrypted Comms · SDR · Tactical · UAV
04 Apps
01

Encrypted Comms

Military-grade end-to-end secured wireless links.

02

SDR

Software-defined radios reprogrammed in the field.

03

Tactical

Battlefield mesh comms — jam-resilient and mobile.

04

Drone Link

UAV control and telemetry under contested spectrum.

VII

Emerging Applications

Robot Swarm · Wireless Bus · XR · Edge AI
04 Apps
01

Wireless Bus

Replace cable harnesses inside the robot itself.

02

Robot Swarm

Multi-agent coordination at machine speed.

03

XR

Persistent extended-reality wireless transport.

04

Edge AI / LPWAN

Inference at the edge over wide-area low-power links.

Technical Specifications

Engineered for the spectrum ahead.

A reconfigurable RF front-end paired with a programmable baseband. Onshore-fabricated, NDAA-compliant supply chain, and field-upgradeable across the entire product life.

  • Sub-1 GHz → 6 GHz.Wi-Fi 7, HaLow, 5G NR, V2X, satellite.
  • Programmable baseband.Firmware-defined waveforms, modulations, and stacks.
  • Defense-grade.Anti-jam, low probability of intercept, encrypted PHY.
  • Designed for fab freedom.Multi-foundry portability for sovereign supply.
Next · 02 / G-Link

The fabric beneath every connected thing.

Long-range. Low-power. Built for the IoT decade.

Explore G-Link →
